title: Ather Remade
description: A Remake of a mod I made few years ago.
body:
## **This has nothing to do with the Aether Mod!**

Mod features a counterpart to the Sky Dimension in Szok, a multiverse i created.

Made using [Mcreator](https://mcreator.net/).

Using [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) is required in order for some recipes to work properly.

Using [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) is highly recommended.

The mod is can be played without them, but keep in mind that playing with Shaders is the intended experience and I highly recommend it. 

Older releases will be available on the [OIO Discord Server](https://discord.gg/927vSk4etf)

Mod icon by 1ts_Windy

## The mod offers: 
- a new sky-like dimension 
- over 20 biomes, with 6 main groups, the Standard, Red, Blue, Green, Unther and Purple Ather Biomes
- 3 new toolsets, a new armor set and mortar compatible with other szok mods
- a lot of plants and distinctive building block with bold color paletts 
- around 50 new advancements with 3 main branches
- 2 new mobs
